title: dianthus × nigritus
intro: Dianthus × nigritus, also known as Chinese pink or dianthus, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dianthus × nigritus include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an anti-aging agent due to its antioxidant properties. Dianthus × nigritus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in skincare products to promote skin health and reduce the signs of aging.
